title: create: ultimate
description: this is a modpack containing a bunch of create addons, other mods, and performance mods
body: create: ultimate adds a bunch of create mod addons, quality-of-life mods, and performance mods. It overhauls create, adding things like auto-netherite, auto-notch apples, auto-diamonds, and auto-brass. It also allows you to automatically make+mine orestones. another thing is the farmers delight bridge. Now, you can automatically make burgers, bacon, salad, pizza, and more! It is also extremely optimized, with over 20 optimization mods working to speed the game up! Some notable ones are sodium, embeddium, and lithium. But, my favorite thing of all in this modpack, is the auto-enchating! With create: enchantment industry and create: dragons plus, enchanting can now be done automatically! It also adds super enchanting, which I'm just going to let you find out what it does.
